The '''environment droid Mark II''' was a bipedal [[Droid/Legends|droid]] model used at the [[Peragus Mining Facility]] during [[3951 BBY]]. It was similar to the [[mining droid Mark II]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
